questions.question: What U.S. port is thought to be the source of the fungus that caused Ireland's potato famine?
What dancer was hailed as the "eighth wonder of the world," after his 1907 debut?
What would a medieval lord turn a squire into, with an "accolade"?
What's the primary mineral component of both rubies and sapphires?
What designer's claim to fame, according to The View's Meredith Vieira, was his "big-ass" pants?
What German car did Newsweek dub "the Yuppie chariot"?
